properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Will the circle be unbroken by and by, Lord by and by There’s a better home awaiting In the sky Lord In the sky.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I was standing by my window On a cold and cloudy day When I saw the horse come rolling For to carry my mother away.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord I told that undertaker Undertaker please drive slow For that lady you are hauling Lord I hate to see her go.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will follow close behind her Try to hold up and be brave But I could not hide my sorrow When they laid her in the grave.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Went back home, my home was lonesome Since my mother she had gone, Found my brothers, sisters crying What a home so sad and lonely.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Glory, glory hallelujah, It will be a glorious day Glory, glory, hallelujah We shall meet to part no more.
